title: Reference-only code pattern
message: This looks like a status, debug, query, setting, or controller code, not a confirmed runtime diagnostic case.

safetyCard.boundary: Use this guidance for preliminary review only. Qualified technician review is required; keep safety protections active.
notes: Stop and escalate when safe access cannot be confirmed.

operatorNextSteps: Verify the display context and consult the exact equipment service manual.
warnings: No runtime diagnostic case was used.
